title: A Tour of My Family's Farm
article_text: Last weekend, I went on a tour of my uncle's farm. I saw a big collection of old farm tools he hangs on the wall. My cousin showed me a negative attitude about the work, but I liked it. A band played music near the farm, and I observed them carefully. My uncle's relative from the city came to see the farm. He uses alternative software to print pictures of the farm. We saw a pair of horses pull a heavy cart. The horse had a double leg injury, so it walked slowly. My uncle told me the truth about the farm's progress this year. I must deliver this video about the farm to my primary school class.

sentences.en: Last weekend, I went on a tour of my uncle's farm.
sentences.zh: 上周末，我参观了叔叔的农场。

words.eng_def: land used for growing food or keeping animals

sentences.en: I saw a big collection of old farm tools he hangs on the wall.
sentences.zh: 我看到他挂在墙上的大量旧农具收藏。

words.eng_def: a group of things kept together
puts something so it is held from above

sentences.en: My cousin showed me a negative attitude about the work, but I liked it.
sentences.zh: 我表弟对这份工作表现出消极的态度，但我喜欢它。

words.eng_def: the way you think or feel about something

sentences.en: A band played music near the farm, and I observed them carefully.
sentences.zh: 一个乐队在农场附近演奏音乐，我仔细观察了他们。

words.eng_def: a group of people who play music together

sentences.en: My uncle's relative from the city came to see the farm.
sentences.zh: 我叔叔住在城市的亲戚来看农场。

sentences.en: He uses alternative software to print pictures of the farm.
sentences.zh: 他用另一种软件打印农场的照片。

words.eng_def: to put words or pictures on paper using a machine

sentences.en: We saw a pair of horses pull a heavy cart.
sentences.zh: 我们看到一对马拉着一辆沉重的马车。

sentences.en: The horse had a double leg injury, so it walked slowly.
sentences.zh: 这匹马腿部受了双重伤，所以它走得很慢。

words.eng_def: the part of the body used for walking

sentences.en: My uncle told me the truth about the farm's progress this year.
sentences.zh: 叔叔告诉我今年农场进展的真相。

sentences.en: I must deliver this video about the farm to my primary school class.
sentences.zh: 我必须把这个关于农场的视频送到我的小学班级。

words.eng_def: to take something to a person or place
first or most important; relating to the first years of school

image_prompts: A boy walking on a path toward a farm with a red barn and green fields under a blue sky.
Inside a farmhouse, a wall with many old farm tools like hoes and rakes hanging from hooks.
A young man with a sad face standing next to a tractor, looking unhappy.
A small band of three musicians playing guitars and drums near a wooden fence on a farm.
A man and a woman from the city standing at the farm gate, looking at the fields.
A person using a laptop with a printer next to it, printing a photo of a farm.
Two brown horses standing together in a field, pulling a wooden cart.
A horse with a bandage on one leg, walking slowly on a dirt path.
An older man talking to a boy, pointing at a field with growing plants.
A boy holding a video camera, recording the farm, with a school building in the background.
